_observed: Legitimate PSA-graded slab — high-priced and credible. The picker should PASS this through every gate (no junk keywords, no condition junk, price well above floor). When a search returns a mix of raw + graded, the picker can legitimately pick this if it's the cheapest credible result, or skip it for a cheaper-but-still-credible raw card. This fixture exists to pin that the picker doesn't accidentally reject graded slabs via some keyword overlap.
title: 1999 Charizard Base Set Shadowless Holo #4 PSA 9 MINT Pokemon Card Slabbed
